summary: The Numpy Nightly CI job produced 45 failed tests and 52 collection errors across many pandas test modules. Every failure carries the same error: NumPy nightly now emits a DeprecationWarning for use of the 'generic' timedelta unit (including implicit bare-integer arithmetic), and that warning is being treated as a hard error by the pytest configuration, causing both collection-time crashes and runtime test failures.
root_cause: NumPy nightly deprecated the 'generic' unit for NumPy timedelta (including implicit conversion of bare integers such as `+ 1`). The pandas test suite uses this pattern in many places, and the pytest run is configured to turn DeprecationWarnings into errors, causing widespread collection failures and test failures wherever pandas code triggers the deprecated behaviour.

evidence.quote: DeprecationWarning: The 'generic' unit for NumPy timedelta is deprecated, and will raise an error in the future. This includes implicit conversion of bare integers (e.g. `+ 1`).Please use a specific unit instead.
evidence.reason: This is the single error message appearing on every FAILED test line and every ERROR collection line, establishing it as the uniform root cause across all failures.

Collection-time errors (not just runtime failures) confirm that the DeprecationWarning is being raised at import/parametrize time and is being treated as a hard error, preventing the test module from loading.

evidence.quote: FAILED pandas/tests/arithmetic/test_timedelta64.py::TestTimedeltaArraylikeAddSubOps::test_td64arr_add_datetime64_nat[Index] - DeprecationWarning: The 'generic' unit for NumPy timedelta is deprecated
evidence.reason: The FAILED lines show the same DeprecationWarning is the direct reported reason for each individual test failure.
Confirms this is the Numpy Nightly build path, meaning the numpy version used is a pre-release nightly that introduced the stricter timedelta unit deprecation.

evidence.quote: = 45 failed, 162298 passed, 25570 skipped, 701 xfailed, 52 errors in 759.43s (0:12:39) =
evidence.reason: Summary confirms 45 test failures and 52 collection errors, all attributable to the single DeprecationWarning being treated as an error.

suggested_fix: Update pandas source code to replace all uses of the deprecated 'generic' NumPy timedelta unit and bare-integer timedelta arithmetic (e.g. `+ 1` without an explicit unit) with unit-qualified equivalents (e.g. `np.timedelta64(1, 'ns')`), addressing the NumPy nightly deprecation before it becomes a hard error.
